titleStmt.title: SII 34.175: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 175. Ratnagiri, Kulittalai Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Harāḷakēśvari temple on the hill.

summary.p: Pāṇḍya, Jaṭāvarman Sundarapāṇḍya, 10th year, Makara, sudi 6, Friday, Uttara-Bhādrapadā = A.D. 1261.

Dēvaṉ Uyyāṉ Arumpukalaḻitta-pāṇḍiya-dēvaṉ, a mudali belonging to the retinue called Agapparivāram of Chōḻapperumāḷ (the Chōḻa king ?) purchased land from the nagarattār of Sivapādasēkarapuram and presented the same for the sacred bath and offerings on the day of Tiruvādirai in the month of Mārgaḻi in the temple of Tirumāṇikkamalai-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kOl caṭaipaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī cuntarapāṇṭiya tEvaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 5 vatu makara nāyaṟṟu purvapakṣatu ṣaṣṭiyum
veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttiraṭṭāti nāḷ Uṭaiyār tirumāṇikkamalai Uṭaiya nāyanār kōyil Āticaṇṭēcura tēvakaṉmi kōyil kaṇakku cōḻaperumāḷa
kapparivārattu mutalikaḷil maturaiyil tēvaṉ Uyyāṉarumpukalaḻitta pāṇṭiya tēvaṉukku nāṅkaḷ kalveṭṭi kuṭutta paricāvatu civapāta cēkara
purattu nakarattār pakkal Ivar koṇṭa piṭārikuḷattukku vaṭakku mēlpāl kellai tāḻippiḷḷai rūpāykku kiḻakku vaṭapāṟkellai tiyāka viṉō ra �kku teṟkku kallai
�kku mēṟku teṉpāṟkellai kīraṉūruṭayāṉuḷḷiṭṭa � kku vaṭakku Innāṉku Ellai
kaṇṇuṭaip perumāḷ mayakkal vukkum kucakkuṟainu ḷpaṭa Innilam koṇṭu mutali
puṇṇiyākattukku ± homattum ney ntamaṭa muṅkalacamuñcūḻ nūl kāli
Eḷḷu ± kaṭuku ± pori ± tiruppaṇ pāṭi ± tirunīṟu ± mañcaḷ poṭi comakumpavattā
tirumuṭiccātta Eḷ Eṇṇai kāppu mañcaḷ mañcaḷ kāppu Orupalam tirumañcaṇa kuṭam
paḷḷittāmam 6 cāṉapaṭi Amutupaṭiṉu paruppu Amutu Urikaṟi Amutu 2 100 lam teṅkā 5 Uppu miḷaku neyyamutu vāḻaippaḻam 4 Aṭaikkāyamutu 4 10 Ilai Amutu paṟṟu tiruviḷakku
Ippaṭiyāl vanta Ivai 1/2 � ḷa koṇṭu cantirātittavarai tirumañcaṇamāṭiyaruḷap paṇṇak kaṭavōmākac cammatittu kalveṭṭikkuṭuttōm Āticaṇṭēśvara tēvakaṉmi kōyil ka
ṇakkarōm Arumpukalaḻitta pāṇṭiya tēvaṉukku sanāpana maṇṭapam taḷam Oṉṟu pātimēṟku varataṉma Uttamāṇṭār taṉāṉa mu tum palla cākku Itti
yāvaṉappiṉaṉṟu Ivaṉ kaṅkāṇiyāka Arumpukalaḻitta pāṇṭiya tēvar pērālē ka māna viṭaṅkaṉ pi
ccaṉeḻuttu vīrapāṇṭiyac lamāṇṭāṉeḻuttu kōvaṇ Aṭiyāṉeḻuttu pi kku
kaṇakku māṇikka nāyakappiriyaṉeḻuttu Aḷakaikkōṉeḻuttu cuntarapāṇṭiyacca varuti Eḻuttu kulacēkaraperumā cakkaravatti Eḻu
ttu kāṇiyuṭaiya Ācārikaḷil nayaṉa muññūṟṟuvac cakkaravattikku It tiruppāvaṭaiyiṉiṉṟu patakkarici cōṟu Oṭukku
Digital edition of SII 34.175 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
